title: Deecell Power Systems Announces Official Launch of Revolutionary Solar-Powered Solutions
content: Deecell Power Systems has officially launched its solar-powered system designed specifically for haulers and sleeper cabs, offering a sustainable alternative to fossil fuel generators. Founded by Andrew Moeck, Deecell provides clean, quiet, and reliable power through 10kW and 15kW systems capable of delivering 120V and 240V AC with 200 amps which is sufficient to support critical systems without fuel or frequent maintenance. Originating from Moeckâ€™s experience with NHRA race haulers, the SPUs underwent rigorous R&D and are now tailored for diverse mobile applications, including race haulers and sleeper cabs. Available in three configurations, Deecellâ€™s systems reduce idle fuel waste, offer white-glove installation and support, and are designed to save thousands annually per truck by eliminating the need for idling during rest periods.
author: Analysts Account
